title: sambucus racemosa var. callicarpa
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. callicarpa, also known as the purple-berried elder, is a variety of the black elderberry (Sambucus racemosa) shrub native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa var. callicarpa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and syrups, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
